name: Sherried Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine 1/4 cup water, dry sherry, and soy sauce. Pour over beef and marinate for 1 hour.
2. Stir-fry carrots, green pepper, and onion in 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Remove from skillet and set aside.
3. Drain the beef and reserve the marinade. Brown the beef in the remaining 1 tablespoon oil.
4. Combine cornstarch with the reserved marinade. Add the vegetable and marinade mixtures to the beef; cook, stirring until the sauce is thickened.
5. Serve over hot rice.
Each serving provides:
365 calories
23.9 g. protein
10.9 g. fat
41.5 g. carbohydrate
3.3 g. dietary fiber
1080 mg. sodium
48 mg. cholesterol
Source: "Light, Lean & Low Fat" booklet
